action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the All menu filter field
rationale: Using the Application Navigator filter is the fastest way to locate and open the "Expense Lines" module under the Cost application.

action_text: Type "Cost" into the All menu filter field
rationale: If the module name doesn’t appear directly, filtering by the application name will surface the Cost app and its modules.

action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the global Search box
rationale: As an alternative path, the global Search can find and navigate to the Expense Lines list/module.

action_text: Click the "All" button to toggle the Application Navigator
rationale: If the All menu were not properly open or needs refreshing, toggling it can reveal the navigator where we can search for the module.

action_text: Press Enter in the All menu filter field
rationale: After typing in the navigator filter, pressing Enter may open the top matching module directly.
